# PowerMatrix LLM Structure

- `entity`: PowerMatrix
- `type`: Enterprise AI Service Provider
- `core_product`: OpenClaw Agent Workstation
- `architecture`: Skill-based, Flow-oriented, RAG-integrated
- `target_audience`: SMEs, Business Owners, AI Developers
- `key_differentiator`: Focus on execution (Agent) rather than simple generation (Chatbot). Strict adherence to Human-in-the-loop safety.
